name: Finis Terrae, Tower of the Necroworld
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>屍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>塔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>フィニステラ
name_jp_tl: Finis Terrae, Tower of the Corpse World
desc: If you control a Level 10 monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Finis Terrae, Tower of the Necroworld" once per turn this way. If this card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 face-up card on the field; that card cannot be destroyed by card effects this turn. You can only use this effect of "Finis Terrae, Tower of the Necroworld" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control a Level 10 monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Finis Terrae, Tower of the Necroworld" once per turn this way. If this card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 face-up card on the field; that card cannot be destroyed by card effects this turn. You can only use this effect of "Finis Terrae, Tower of the Necroworld" once per turn.
eff: If you control a Level 10 monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Finis Terrae, Tower of the Necroworld" once per turn this way. If this card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 face-up card on the field; that card cannot be destroyed by card effects this turn. You can only use this effect of "Finis Terrae, Tower of the Necroworld" once per turn.

action: Activates if sent to the Graveyard
mst: Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
